description_long: This object is a loaf of bread composed of five distinct, evenly spaced sections, each with a rounded top and a light tan color. The exterior crust is a medium brown shade, with a slightly glossy finish and a subtle, blocky texture reminiscent of a baked, artisan loaf. The ends of the loaf are flat, with one end displaying a starburst pattern in dark brown or black, possibly representing a stylized cut or scoring. The interior appears soft and light, contrasting with the firmer, darker crust. The loaf is unsliced, with each section joined together, and the overall shape is elongated and rectangular with rounded edges. There is no visible packaging, branding, or labeling on the surface.
description: A long, artisan-style loaf of bread with five rounded sections, a medium brown crust, and a light tan interior. The ends are flat, with one featuring a dark starburst pattern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the flat end of the loaf with a prominent dark starburst pattern and the rounded tops of the five sections.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the elongated, rectangular shape, the five distinct rounded sections, and the contrast between the brown crust and light interior.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the opposite flat end of the loaf, which is plain and lacks the starburst pattern seen on the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors view 1, showing the five rounded sections and the layered crust and interior.
attribute_crust_pattern: The crust has a medium brown color with a slightly blocky, rustic texture and a subtle sheen. The front end features a distinctive dark starburst pattern, while the rest of the crust is smooth and unscored.
